manager.name: ComfyUI-Manager
manager.reason: CLI and UI management for custom node installation, updates, snapshots, and dependency fixes.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-EasyOCR
nodes.reason: Detect text and produce OCR masks for text/watermark removal workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI_essentials
nodes.reason: Provides MaskBoundingBox+ for padded bbox crops around detected OCR masks.

nodes.name: was-node-suite-comfyui
nodes.reason: Provides Masks Combine Batch to union EasyOCR's batched text masks.

nodes.name: comfyui-fast-mosaic-detector
nodes.reason: Detects mosaic/pixel-block regions and outputs a binary mask for auto mosaic inpaint workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Olm-DragCrop
nodes.reason: Adds an interactive drag-crop image node for explicit manual box selection in workflows.
